$comment: Plan-routing (cpp-style): the model emits one search query per knowledge library, or an empty string to skip it. The next node (test.generate) routes each non-empty query into that library's search, so only the relevant libraries are consulted. On a malformed plan, proceed to generate ungrounded rather than abort.

stdlib_q.description: a Go standard-library package/symbol query, or empty

patterns_q.description: a GoF design-pattern query, or empty
